languages.text: "Джай, пусти слух о том, что мы ищем наемников для работы с Каисом-торр-Шайга".
"Jae, spread the word that we are seeking mercenaries to work with Kais-torr-Shaiga."
languages.original_text: "Джай, пусти слух о том, что мы ищем наемников для работы с Каисом-торр-Шайга".

traits.locale_text: "Jae, spread the word that we are seeking mercenaries to work with Kais-torr-Shaiga."
"Jae, spread the word that we are seeking mercenaries to work with Kais-torr-Shaiga."
"Jae, spread the word that we are seeking mercenaries to work with Kais-torr-Shaiga."

languages.text: 「ジェイ、我々はカイストーア・シャイガと協力する傭兵を探していることを伝えてくれ」
languages.original_text: "Jae, spread the word that we are seeking mercenaries to work with Kais-torr-Shaiga."

traits.locale_text: 「ジェイ、我々はカイストーア・シャイガと協力する傭兵を探していることを伝えてくれ。」

languages.text: «Jae, extienda la noticia de que buscamos mercenarios para Kais-torr-Shaiga».
languages.original_text: "Jae, spread the word that we are seeking mercenaries to work with Kais-torr-Shaiga."

traits.locale_text: «Jae, extienda la noticia de que buscamos mercenarios para Kais-torr-Shaiga».

languages.text: “婕伊，放出风声：我们在招募佣兵，协助凯斯-托尔-夏迦行动。”
languages.original_text: "Jae, spread the word that we are seeking mercenaries to work with Kais-torr-Shaiga."

traits.locale_text: “婕伊，放出风声：我们在招募佣兵，协助凯斯-托尔-夏迦行动。”

languages.text: "Jae, sagt allen, dass wir Söldner für Kais-torr-Shaiga suchen."
languages.original_text: "Jae, spread the word that we are seeking mercenaries to work with Kais-torr-Shaiga."

traits.locale_text: "Jae, sagt allen, dass wir Söldner für Kais-torr-Shaiga suchen."

languages.text: "Jae, Kais-torr-Shaiga ile çalışacak paralı askerler aradığımızı herkese duyur."
languages.original_text: "Jae, spread the word that we are seeking mercenaries to work with Kais-torr-Shaiga."

traits.locale_text: "Jae, Kais-torr-Shaiga ile çalışacak paralı askerler aradığımızı herkese duyur."

languages.text: « Jae, faites savoir que nous recherchons des mercenaires pour assister Kais-torr-Shaiga. »
languages.original_text: "Jae, spread the word that we are seeking mercenaries to work with Kais-torr-Shaiga."

traits.locale_text: « Jae, faites savoir que nous recherchons des mercenaires pour assister Kais-torr-Shaiga. »
